title: Tnt Tools
description: This mod adds new TNT tools to the game, that create a TNT explosion upon use! Still in beta.
body: TNT Tools adds tools that make a TNT esplosion upon use! The explosion doesn't damage players either. All tools are craftable, enchantable and repairable in survival. Currently, the only item is the TNT Pickaxe, as the mod is in its alpha stage.
